message:
fix: use
for mermaid node label line breaks (#1369) Mermaid requires
for line breaks in node labels, not \n. The \n was rendering as concatenated text (e.g. 'KubernetesClusters' instead of 'Kubernetes' on one line and 'Clusters' on the next). Verified via Chrome CDP that all labels now render without truncation. Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson

files.patch:

:8080"] Browser["Browser"] MCP["MCP Bridge"] - K8s["Kubernetes\nClusters"] - Agent["kc-agent\n:8585"] + K8s["Kubernetes
Clusters"] + Agent["kc-agent
:8585"] CLI["AI Coding Agent"] - OpsStdio["kubestellar-ops\nMCP (stdio)"] - DeployStdio["kubestellar-deploy\nMCP (stdio)"] + OpsStdio["kubestellar-ops
MCP (stdio)"] + DeployStdio["kubestellar-deploy
MCP (stdio)"] AI["AI Provider API"] User -- invokes --> CLI
